issues.title: Cyclospora outbreak linked to recalled iceberg lettuce
issues.short: FDA traceback linked an ongoing five-state Cyclospora outbreak to recalled iceberg lettuce supplied by Taylor Farms de Mexico.
issues.details: The consumer-facing recall includes Marketside Iceberg Salad (12 oz and 24 oz) and Shredded Lettuce (8 oz and 16 oz) with listed July–August 2026 best-by dates. FDA says traceback converged on Taylor Farms de Mexico; as of July 19, product samples had no confirmed positive result and the investigation remained ongoing.

evidence.summary: FDA traceback converged on Taylor Farms de Mexico as supplier of shredded iceberg lettuce served where outbreak cases reported eating; affected products were recalled.

sources.name: FDA outbreak investigation: Cyclospora illnesses and iceberg lettuce
